notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Joc Pederson singles on a ground ball to third baseman Brendan Donovan. Joc Pederson to 2nd. Joc Pederson advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by third baseman Brendan Donovan.

notableEvents.label: Brandon Nimmo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Nimmo grounds into a double play, second baseman Cole Young to shortstop J.P. Crawford to first baseman Josh Naylor. Ezequiel Duran out at 2nd. Brandon Nimmo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Brandon Nimmo rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brandon Nimmo grounds into a double play, second baseman Cole Young to shortstop J.P. Crawford to first baseman Josh Naylor. Ezequiel Duran out at 2nd. Brandon Nimmo out at 1st.
